Phase-33.NAME: MTProto Admin Ops and Observability
Phase-33.Goal: Add operator controls and redacted observability for MTProto assignment lifecycle and runtime bridge health.

NonGoals.item-2: No shared 443 cutover in this phase.

Steps.step-1: Add admin API for redacted assignment list, user assignment detail, runtime health, reissue, and revoke.
Steps.step-2: Add audit events for reissue and revoke without storing full links, verification tokens, or raw secrets.
Steps.step-3: Add admin frontend surface with mobile-safe search, status filters, bridge health, and confirmation-safe actions.
Steps.step-4: Add log markers for issue, replay, degraded runtime, reissue, and revoke paths.
Steps.step-5: Add backend/admin frontend verification for redaction, role gates, and destructive confirmation flows.

Verification.command: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_mtproto_admin_ops.py tests/test_admin_device_control.py tests/test_mtproto_assignment_registry.py tests/test_kpproton_runtime_bridge.py -v
python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-33.xml docs/modules/M-047.xml docs/verification/V-M-047.xml docs/verification-index.xml docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml && mygrace lint

AcceptanceCriteria.item-1: Admins can find assignment status and bridge health without seeing raw secrets by default.
AcceptanceCriteria.item-2: Reissue and revoke are explicit audited actions, and revoke removes the runtime SNI policy.
AcceptanceCriteria.item-3: Revoking MTProto does not disable KrotPN subscription or VPN devices.
AcceptanceCriteria.item-4: Admin mobile console remains compact and confirmation-safe.

Risks.risk-1: Admin screens can accidentally expose user proxy secrets if response schemas are too broad.
Risks.risk-2: Reissue behavior after secret rotation must be clear or users will hold stale Telegram links.

Completion.item-1: Backend admin API now exposes redacted /api/v1/admin/mtproto assignment list/detail, runtime health, reissue, and revoke endpoints.
Completion.item-2: Reissue and revoke require explicit confirmation, write admin audit events, remove runtime policy state on revoke, and return safe assignment/runtime summaries without owner-only credentials.
Completion.item-3: Frontend-admin now includes compact /mtproto navigation and page for assignment search, status filters, bridge health, and confirmation-safe actions.
Completion.item-4: Local Phase-33 verification passed on 2026-05-14: 16 backend tests, frontend-admin build, static smoke, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, and diff whitespace check.
